segments.text: DIRECTOR: Good morning. Welcome to the Early Learning Childcare Centre.
segments.translation: 主管：早晨好。欢迎来到儿童早教护理中心。

segments.text: How may I help you?
segments.translation: 我要怎样帮助您？

segments.text: CAROL: Hi. I spoke to you last week about enrolling my daughter for next year.
segments.translation: 卡罗：你好。我上周跟你说过我的女儿明年想来入学的事情。

segments.text: DIRECTOR: Oh, yes. I'll just get some details from you.
segments.translation: 主管：哦是的。我需要你提供些详细信息。

segments.text: So, you're her mother?
segments.translation: 所以你是她的妈妈？

segments.text: CAROL: That's right.
segments.translation: 卡罗：是的。

segments.text: DIRECTOR: And, can I have your name?
segments.translation: 主管：请问你的名字？

segments.text: CAROL: It's Carol, Carol Smith.
segments.translation: 卡罗：是卡罗，卡罗·史密斯。

segments.text: DIRECTOR: And your daughter's name?
segments.translation: 主管：那你女儿的名字呢？

segments.text: CAROL: It's Kate.
segments.translation: 卡罗：是凯特。

segments.text: DIRECTOR: Now, we have several groups at the centre and we cater for children from three to five years old.
segments.translation: 主管：现在，我们在中心里有若干组。我们主要服务于三到五岁的孩子。

segments.text: How old is your daughter?
segments.translation: 你的女儿多大了？

segments.text: CAROL: She's three now but she turns four next month.
segments.translation: 卡罗：她现在三岁但是下月就四岁了。

segments.text: DIRECTOR: I'll put four down because that's how old she'll be when she starts.
segments.translation: 主管：我给登记成四岁，因为那是她开始上课的年龄。

segments.text: CAROL: Fine, she's so excited about her birthday and coming to the centre.
segments.translation: 卡罗：好的。她对于自己的生日和要来中心这件事显得很兴奋。

segments.text: DIRECTOR: That's good to hear.
segments.translation: 主管：很高兴听到你这么说。

segments.text: And what's your address?
segments.translation: 你的地址是什么？

segments.text: CAROL: It's 46 Wombat Road.
segments.translation: 卡罗：是沃姆巴特路46号。

segments.text: That's W-O-M-B-A-T, Woodside 4032.
segments.translation: 是W-O-M-B-A-T，林边4032号。

segments.text: DIRECTOR: And what's the phone number?
segments.translation: 主管：那电话号码呢？

segments.text: DIRECTOR: So, have you decided on the days you'd like to bring your daughter here?
segments.translation: 主管：那么，你决定你带女儿来这里的日子了吗？

segments.text: CAROL: I'd prefer Monday and Wednesday if possible.
segments.translation: 卡罗：如果可以，我希望是周一或周三。

segments.text: DIRECTOR: Mmm. I'll check, Monday's fine, but I think the centre is already full for Wednesday.
segments.translation: 主管：嗯。让我看一下。周一可以，但是周三中心已经满了。

segments.text: Erm. Yes. Sorry. It seems to be a very popular day.
segments.translation: 呃。是的。很抱歉。看起来周三这天很受欢迎。

segments.text: We can offer you a Thursday or a Friday as well.
segments.translation: 我们也可以向你提供周四或周五。

segments.text: CAROL: Oh dear. I suppose Thursday would be all right because she has swimming on Friday.
segments.translation: 卡罗：哦天呢。我想周四应该可以，因为周五她要去游泳。

segments.text: DIRECTOR: OK, got that. Because a lot of parents work, we do offer flexible start and finish times.
segments.translation: 主管：好的，明白了。因为很多家长工作，我们也提供灵活的开始和结束的时间。

segments.text: We are open from 7:30 in the morning until 6 o'clock at night.
segments.translation: 我们从早晨7点30开业，直到晚上6点。

segments.text: What time would you like your daughter to start?
segments.translation: 你想你的女儿几点开始？

segments.text: CAROL: I need to get to work in the city by 9:00 so I'll drop her off at 8:30.
segments.translation: 卡罗：我需要9点到城里上班，所以我会8.30把她送到这里。

segments.text: You're pretty close to the city here so that should give me plenty of time to get there.
segments.translation: 你们这里离城里很近，所以这应该能留给我充足的时间到工作地点。

segments.text: DIRECTOR: That's fine. Now, we also need to decide which group she'll be in.
segments.translation: 主管：好的。现在，我们还需要确定她参加哪组。

segments.text: We have two different groups and they're divided up according to age.
segments.translation: 我们有两个不同的组，它们是按照年龄划分的。

segments.text: There's the green group, which is for three- to four-year-olds.
segments.translation: 绿队是面向3-4岁的孩子的。

segments.text: And then there's the red group which is for four- to five-year-olds.
segments.translation: 红队是面向4-5岁的孩子的。

segments.text: CAROL: She's quite mature for her age and she can already write her name and read a little.
segments.translation: 卡罗：她在她的年龄算比较成熟的，她已经可以写她的名字，并且认识一些字。

segments.text: DIRECTOR: Well, I'll put her in the red group and we can always change her to the green one if there are any problems.
segments.translation: 主管：那么我就把她放到红队，如果有任何的问题，我们随时可以把她调换到绿队。

segments.text: CAROL: That sounds fine.
segments.translation: 卡罗：听起来不错。

segments.text: DIRECTOR: OK. Let's move on to meals.
segments.translation: 主管：好的。让我们谈谈饮食。

segments.text: We can provide breakfast, lunch and dinner.
segments.translation: 我们提供早饭、午饭和晚饭。

segments.text: As she's finishing pretty early, she won't need dinner.
segments.translation: 因为她结束得比较早，她不需要晚饭。

segments.text: Will you give her breakfast before she comes?
segments.translation: 来之前你会给她吃早饭吗？

segments.text: CAROL: Yes, she'll only need lunch.
segments.translation: 卡罗：是的，她只需要午饭。

segments.text: DIRECTOR: Now, does she have any medical conditions we need to know about?
segments.translation: 主管：好的，有没有我们需要知道的她的身体情况？

segments.text: Does she have asthma or any hearing problems for example?
segments.translation: 比如她有没有哮喘或者听力问题？

segments.text: CAROL: No. But she does need to wear glasses.
segments.translation: 卡罗：没有。但是她的确需要戴眼镜。

segments.text: DIRECTOR: Oh, I'll make a note of that.
segments.translation: 主管：哦，我要把这个记下来。

segments.text: CAROL: Yes, she's pretty good about wearing them. She can't see much without them.
segments.translation: 卡罗：是的，她已经很习惯戴眼镜了。没有眼镜她看不清太多东西。

segments.text: DIRECTOR: Right. OK.
segments.translation: 主管：好的。没问题。

segments.text: Now, I also need emergency contact details.
segments.translation: 现在，我需要一位紧急联系人的信息。

segments.text: CAROL: So what sort of information do you need?
segments.translation: 卡罗：那么你需要哪些信息呢？

segments.text: DIRECTOR: Just the name and number of a friend or family member we can contact in case we can't get hold of you at any time.
segments.translation: 主管：只是一位朋友或家庭成员的名字和电话，以便我们找不到你的时候可以联系。

segments.text: CAROL: OK. That'd better be my sister ... Jenny Ball. That's B-A-double L.
segments.translation: 卡罗：好的。那最好是我的姐妹，詹妮·鲍尔。是B-A-双写L。

segments.text: Her phone number is 3346 7523.
DIRECTOR: Great. So she is the child's aunt?
segments.translation: 主管：很好。所以她是孩子的姨妈？

segments.text: CAROL: Yes, that's right.
segments.translation: 卡罗：是的，是这样。

segments.text: DIRECTOR: I'll make a note of that as well.
segments.translation: 主管：我把这个也会记下来。

segments.text: Now, is there anything you'd like to ask?
segments.translation: 现在，还有什么你需要问的？

segments.text: CAROL: What about payment?
segments.translation: 卡罗：怎样支付呢？

segments.text: How much are the fees each term?
segments.translation: 每学期多少钱？

segments.text: DIRECTOR: Well, for two days and the hours you've chosen, that will be $450 altogether.
segments.translation: 主管：嗯，按照你选择的两天和小时数，应该是一共450美元。

segments.text: CAROL: OK, and do I have to pay that now?
segments.translation: 卡罗：好的。我需要现在付款吗？

segments.text: DIRECTOR: NO, we send out invoices once the children start at the centre.
segments.translation: 主管：不需要。孩子一旦来到中心，我们会发送费用清单。

segments.text: You can choose to pay at the end of each term or we do offer a slightly discounted rate if you pay every month.
segments.translation: 你可以选择在每学期期末付款，或者如果你每月付，我们会给你一个小小的优惠。

segments.text: CAROL: Oh, I'll do that then.
segments.translation: 卡罗：哦，那就这么办吧。

segments.text: I find it easier to budget that way and I'm not used to the term dates just yet.
segments.translation: 这样预算更容易些，我还不太习惯学期的日期。

segments.text: DIRECTOR: Good, it makes it a lot simpler for us as well.
segments.translation: 主管：好的。这样对于我们也简单很多。

segments.text: Well, that's everything. Would you like me to show you around ... ?
segments.translation: 那么，这就是所有的事了。需要我带你四处看看吗……？
